revisions.description:
Initial version of this POU TRM, replacing the previous 2017 CMUA Savings Estimation POU Technical Reference Manual.


  • New measure structure, terminology, and information.
  • New list of measures extracted and summarized from the CA electronic technical reference manual (eTRM).

Official publication of the 2025 POU TRM with finalized list of measures. Other minor updates include:
  • Added notes when the Oversized Offering ID and Base Case Description Tables file is needed for a measure
  • Updated the default EndDate calculation to account for leap year and to fall on the day before the day of the StartDate
  • Minor text and formatting updates

Official publication of the 2026 POU TRM. Updates from the 2025 edition include:
  • Finalized list of measures for the 2026 program year and code cycle and expired the program year 2025 measure versions
  • For measures with no EndDate in the eTRM, revised the POU TRM EndDate logic to add 3 years after the new program start date (e.g., 2026-01-01). For measures with older StartDate, the 3-years after StartDate logic may expire the measures for the new edition.
  • Replaced the embedded streamlined permutation spreadsheets with eTRM reference links, which reduces the overall PDF size while still allowing users to access the file without an eTRM login.
  • Added "Fuel ID" field and definition to the eTRM data specification table and Key Terminology section for reference. Field is not utilized in the POU TRM
Correction to the 2026 POU TRM to repopulate missing SWFS021-05 measure
